items.headline: Quintana set for MRI after exiting start with left elbow discomfort

news_items.headline: Ohtani dissatisfied despite L.A.'s no-hit bid, HR
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani lamented the flaws in his performance Wednesday night -- even after hitting a leadoff home run and positioning the Dodgers for a combined no-hitter.

news_items.headline: Red Sox News & Links: Roman Anthony, Garrett Crochet progressing in return from injury
news_items.summary: Anyone in the mood for some good injury news? While he still has yet to face living pitching, Roman Anthony is finally swinging a bat without pain the injured hand that has kept him out for most of this month. Granted, these are “dry swings,” which are every bit as fun and exciting as dry […]

news_items.headline: Injuries: Teoscar, Tigers, Greene, Blue Jays, Red Sox
Blue Jays Calling Up Charles McAdoo
news_items.summary: I missed this yesterday (being fair, I haven’t turned on the computer for two days, but I did ride my bike 100 very hill kilometers over the last couple of days). Charles McAdoo will be getting the call-up today. He is hitting .250/.356/.436 with 6 home runs, 28 walks, 40 strikeouts and 6 stolen bases […]

news_items.summary: Two months into the 2026 season, the top of our list is becoming more consistent. But Week 9 still brought a top-10 debut and one AL club's highest ranking of the season.

news_items.headline: MLB gets first official CBA proposal from union
news_items.summary: The Major League Baseball Players Association made the first proposal in collective bargaining talks with MLB.

news_items.headline: Sánchez scoreless run tops Phils record from 1911
news_items.summary: Cristopher Sánchez extended his scoreless innings streak to 44⅔ innings on Wednesday to set the Phillies franchise record by passing Hall of Famer Grover Cleveland Alexander.

news_items.headline: Clean start: Mets' Benge has key hits after shave
news_items.summary: Carson Benge figured maybe that scraggly mustache was holding him back -- so the rookie outfielder made a big league decision that was followed by a pair of clutch singles in the Mets' win over the Reds.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Hernández has 'significant' oblique tear
news_items.summary: The Dodgers placed super-utility man Enrique Hernandez on the injured list Wednesday and will do the same with left fielder Teoscar Hernandez on Friday.

news_items.headline: Yanks' Cole dazzles again, but notes 'it's 2 games...
news_items.summary: The Yankees' Gerrit Cole was quick to point out Wednesday night that his second straight dominant start in his long-awaited return from Tommy John surgery was just that: his second start. "Small sample size," the former Cy Young winner said.

news_items.headline: Cards' May loses no-hitter in 8th as Brewers rally...
news_items.summary: Dustin May carried a no-hitter into the eighth for the Cardinals, but the Brewers broke through in the eighth with three hits and two runs as they rallied for a 2-1 victory.
